title: Law of Harmonics FAIL: demonstrates a wrong harmony ratio and a wrong product
sources: Iverson, B., QA-3 Ch 4, Law of Harmonics (Iverson, 1991)
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture (added 2026-07-06 to close a fixture-coverage gap -- this family previously had zero FAIL fixtures). Plants two independent, deterministically detectable violations: (1) pair[0] declares product1=31 instead of the correct b*e*d*a=1*2*3*5=30 for QN (1,2); (2) pair[1] declares harmony_ratio=0.5 instead of the correct min(5,7)/max(5,7)=0.7143 for the (1,3)/(2,3) pair.

harmonic_pairs.note: deliberately wrong: product1 should be 1*2*3*5=30, not 31
deliberately wrong: harmony_ratio should be min(5,7)/max(5,7)=0.7143, not 0.5
